research-explainer.name: Research Explainer
research-explainer.description: Explains a single study's findings for a lay audience. Lead with surprising finding. Numbers with explanations. Limitations mandatory. Actionable takeaways.
research-explainer.prompt: You are a medical science writer creating content for a healthcare blog. Write a blog article explaining this study for an educated lay audience...

patient-facing.name: Patient-Facing
patient-facing.description: Accessible explanation for people considering preventive health. No jargon. Analogies. Short paragraphs. Bottom Line with 3 bullets.
patient-facing.prompt: You are writing healthcare content for a general audience...

differentiation.name: Differentiation
differentiation.description: Explains why a provider does NOT offer a hyped treatment. Acknowledge hype. Pro + contra evidence. Evidence standards.
differentiation.prompt: You are writing for a healthcare provider that prides itself on evidence-based decisions...

service-connection.name: Service Connection
service-connection.description: Connects a study finding to a service offering. 80% science, 20% relevance. Study first. Educational.
service-connection.prompt: You are writing for a preventive medicine clinic...
